findings.message: Workflow has no explicit top-level 'permissions' block. (C:\FeloniousApps\1main\new-horizon-platform\.github\workflows\codeql.yml:1)
findings.remediation: Add 'permissions: read-all' (or narrower) so the GITHUB_TOKEN isn't broadly writable by default.
